entity.description:
Hello Kitty Food Contact Wipes are the perfect companion for your daily adventures!
Whether you are at home, at school, or on the go, you can use these wipes before and after meals to ensure hygiene and freshness.

Wipes are safe to use on:
-Hand & Mouth
-Cutleries
-Fruits & Vegetables
-Pacifiers & Toys
-Safe For Babies

product.description:
Best flushable wipes for your personal hygiene, letting you feel fresh and odour-free all day long.
Natural Ingredients: Made with organic extracts and ingredients without harmful chemicals like Paraben and Alcohol.
Worry-free formula: Dermatologically tested for irritants, toxins and allergens. Contains unique premium ingredients which eliminate bacteria and odour. Suitable for sensitive skin of all ages, including toddlers.
Flushable: Made with a soft, smooth, thick yet biodegradable sheet of fabric.
Eco friendly: Its size and moisture ensures that you need only ONE sheet per use.
Refreshing to use and Odour FREE. Sheet dimension: 180x200mm (+/- 5mm) Basic Weight: 68gsm Usage : Suitable for babies, toddlers, adults, sensitive skin - contains specially selected ingredients which remove odour from genitals Refreshing Anytime Anywhere

product.description:
Directions: peel back sealing sticker to pull out wipes. Wipe hands or surfaces as required. Re-seal sticker to remain moisture in pack.

caution: for external use only. Avoid direct contact with eyes, open wound & burns. Use under adult supervision if product is used by children. Store in a cool place, away from direct sunlight. Do not flush in toilet.

metaData.Ingredients: Aqua, Sodium Benzoate, Glycerin, Alkyl Glucoside, Propanediol, Citric Acid.
metaData.Key Information:
Caredyn x POKEMON Food Safe Wipes are specially designed to use on hand and mouth, cutleries, fruits & veggies, pacifiers & toys, and anything else that comes in contact with your food. They are safe for babies and adults alike, as they are made with 100% food grade ingredients, dermatologically tested, and naturally anti-bacterial. Whether you are at home, at school, or on the go, you can use these wipes before and after meals to ensure hygiene and freshness. Hello Kitty Food Contact Wipes are the perfect companion for your daily adventures! Rinse Free Formulation Food Contact Safe Wipes are safe to use on: Hand & Mouth. Cutleries. Fruits & Vegetables. Pacifiers & Toys. Safe For Babies.
• No Alcohol & Harsh Chemicals
• 100% Food Grade Ingredients
• Naturally Antibacterial. Dermatologically Tested.
